edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Lean Into Mercy in the Morning into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Receive the near word this morning; mercy has already placed the next step within reach.
edits.reason: Keeps the Deuteronomy 30 nearness theme practical without using the repeated frame.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry See Again the Father's Patience into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Walk the command as a loved child today; the Father's way is life, not rejection.
edits.reason: Preserves commandments as life-giving grace rather than pressure or performance.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Love Teach Love Stronger Than Fear into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let warning become mercy today; return before fear teaches your heart to hide.
edits.reason: Holds warning, return, and mercy together for the January closeout.

entries.morning_impact: Receive the near word this morning; mercy has already placed the next step within reach.

entries.morning_impact: Walk the command as a loved child today; the Father's way is life, not rejection.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 3 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
